description: Regular and Cards Against Humanity style clues about New Year wishes, making wishes, and hoping for change

regular_clues.clue: The midnight moment when anything seems possible
A fresh start that happens once a year
You make these on January 1st but break them by February
The countdown that marks the official beginning of a new year
The silent hope people make as the clock strikes twelve
The tradition of crossing off dates until the next major celebration
Champagne bubbles rising at the stroke of midnight
The number that represents a fresh start in numerology
The month where gym memberships spike and then decline
The personal goals we set but rarely achieve
The feeling that this year will be different
The time people promise to change their habits
What you hope the next twelve months will bring
The list you write but rarely revisit
The night when strangers kiss and hug
The promise to yourself at midnight
The glass you raise at 11:59 PM
When you vow to hit the gym five times a week
The arbitrary date when everyone thinks they'll change
The period when people actively pursue their goals
The moment when you set intentions for the year ahead
The ancient tradition of making vows to improve oneself
The belief that a new year brings new opportunities
The quiet moment before the year officially begins
What the clock represents when it turns over
The collective desire for improvement on January 1st
The tradition of reviewing the past year
What January first symbolizes for many cultures
The secret hopes we wish upon the changing year
The moment when 365 days of possibilities await you

cah_clues.clue: What millennials actually wish for on New Year's Eve
cah_clues.answer: Affordable housing and mental health therapy

cah_clues.clue: The New Year's resolution that fails faster than anything else
cah_clues.answer: Going to the gym regularly

cah_clues.clue: What your New Year's wish reveals about your life
cah_clues.answer: That you're basically unhappy right now

cah_clues.clue: The tradition where we pretend January 1st is magical
cah_clues.answer: Making New Year's resolutions

cah_clues.clue: What gym owners wish for every New Year
cah_clues.answer: Overconfident people who won't show up by February

cah_clues.clue: The first thing you'll break this year
cah_clues.answer: Your New Year's resolution

cah_clues.clue: What your New Year's wish really translates to
cah_clues.answer: Please let next year suck less than this one

cah_clues.clue: The lie you tell yourself every January 1st
cah_clues.answer: This year will be different

cah_clues.clue: Why people actually make New Year's resolutions
cah_clues.answer: To feel like they have some control over their lives

cah_clues.clue: The real reason gym memberships spike in January
cah_clues.answer: People with crushing self-doubt and disposable income

cah_clues.clue: What parents wish for their kids on New Year's Eve
cah_clues.answer: That they move out soon

cah_clues.clue: The social media challenge that actually works every year
cah_clues.answer: Pretending to transform your life on January 1st

cah_clues.clue: What TikTok will be filled with on January 1st
cah_clues.answer: People vowing to become fit and productive

cah_clues.clue: The one wish that never comes true for office workers
cah_clues.answer: Finally leaving this miserable job

cah_clues.clue: What your ex wishes for you on New Year's
cah_clues.answer: That you develop taste and self-respect

cah_clues.clue: The most honest New Year's resolution
cah_clues.answer: To cope better with my problems through avoidance

cah_clues.clue: What you're actually wishing for at midnight
cah_clues.answer: That the next year won't be as disastrous as this one

cah_clues.clue: The New Year's resolution politicians make
cah_clues.answer: To break fewer promises this year

cah_clues.clue: What your dating app profile suggests about your wishes
cah_clues.answer: That you're desperately unhappy and lonely

cah_clues.clue: The reality behind champagne toasts at midnight
cah_clues.answer: Everyone's hoping this year doesn't go to hell

cah_clues.clue: What Instagram influencers wish for on New Year's Eve
cah_clues.answer: More followers and sponsorship deals

cah_clues.clue: The universal New Year's wish that defines the human condition
cah_clues.answer: That things will finally get better

cah_clues.clue: What corporations are wishing for your New Year's resolution
cah_clues.answer: That you spend money trying to improve yourself

cah_clues.clue: The only New Year's wish that actually comes true
cah_clues.answer: That you'll forget you made this resolution by February

cah_clues.clue: What motivational speakers wish for on your New Year
cah_clues.answer: That you buy their course on life transformation

cah_clues.clue: The real reason people countdown to midnight
cah_clues.answer: To feel like something meaningful is happening

cah_clues.clue: What your drunk friend's New Year's wish actually is
cah_clues.answer: To not text their ex this time

cah_clues.clue: The New Year's wish your therapist hears most often
cah_clues.answer: That their family wasn't so dysfunctional

cah_clues.clue: What cryptocurrency bros are wishing for in the New Year
cah_clues.answer: Another bull run to brag about on Twitter

cah_clues.clue: The beautiful lie we tell ourselves every January 1st
cah_clues.answer: That we can change fundamental aspects of ourselves overnight
